\tzpentry{ID5907}{Quantum Density}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5907 introduces Quantum Density as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
$$\rho_{\text{vac}} = \int \frac{d^3 k}{(2\pi)^3} \frac{\hbar \omega_k}{2} + \text{TZP corrections}$$
